title: Upstart Q2 2025 Slides: First GAAP Profitable Quarter with 102% Revenue Growth
text: Upstart achieved its first GAAP profitable quarter in Q2 2025 with GAAP net income of $5.6 million, a substantial improvement from a loss of $54.5 million in Q2 2024. Revenue grew 102% year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA reached $53.1 million with a 21% margin, up from negative $9.3 million with negative 7% margin in Q2 2024. The company provided an optimistic outlook, forecasting Q3 2025 revenue of approximately $280 million above consensus and full fiscal year 2025 revenue of approximately $1.055 billion, surpassing analyst projections of $1.01 billion. The profitability turnaround reflected operational efficiency improvements and strong revenue growth across all product categories.
